<content>625: 
626: /// Extract raw text from a `ProseMirror` doc with `code_block` nodes.
627: ///
628: /// Used for code and config files where the content is a single `code_block`.
629: fn extract_raw_text(doc: &serde_json::Value) -> String {
630:     let mut parts = Vec::new();
631: 
632:     if let Some(content) = doc.get("content").and_then(|c| c.as_array()) {
633:         for node in content {
634:             let node_type = node.get("type").and_then(|t| t.as_str()).unwrap_or("");
635:             if node_type == "code_block"
636:                 && let Some(inline_content) = node.get("content").and_then(|c| c.as_array()) {
637:                     for inline in inline_content {
638:                         if let Some(text) = inline.get("text").and_then(|t| t.as_str()) {
639:                             parts.push(text.to_owned());
640:                         }
641:                     }
642:                 }
643:         }
644:     }
645: 
646:     parts.join("\n")
647: }
648:
